parameters: $game_player.y == 11
You can notice that some tilesets change colours
at the morning and at night.
Those are actually different tilesets that swap
each other depending of the time of the day.
In the script GameMap (Data-Scripts-003 Game Classes), from around line 74, there's a section that
indicates which tilesets are listed, and to what other tilesets change
at the morning and at night.
The changes depend of the ID number of the
tilesets that are in the Tile Sets Database.
This is how time system works in GSC-style games.
$PokemonGlobal.surfing=true
$game_player.y == 11
pbTransferSurfing(44,0,11)
$game_player.y == 10
pbTransferSurfing(44,0,10)
pbTransferSurfing(44,0,9)
\PN's HOUSE
These doors are examples of good, solid door
events.
When the player goes outside, be sure to transfer
the player onto the door rather than next to it.  It looks
better that way.
You can turn on and off the TURBO Mode by
pressing ALT button.
Check 'Turbo' Script to see more information.
